usage: deleteRouteBlk [-help] [-cutLayer <list of layerName | layerZ | all>] [-drcRegionLayer <list of layerName | layerZ | all>] [-layer <list of layerName | layerZ | all>] [-trimMetalLayer <list of layerName | layerZ | all>] [-type {all routes fills slots partial}] [-box {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -name <blk> | -all ]

options.name: -cutLayer
options.description: <list of layerName | layerZ | all> specify cut layers

options.name: -drcRegionLayer
options.description: <list of layerName | layerZ | all> specify region layers

options.name: -layer
options.description: <list of layerName | layerZ | all> specify metal layers

options.name: -name
options.description: blockage names need be deleted, wild char support.

options.name: -trimMetalLayer
options.description: <list of layerName | layerZ | all> specify trimMetal layers

options.name: -type
options.description: only delete this type of blockage,default all
